files.patch:
@@ -1,2 +0,0 @@
-#!/usr/bin/env bash
-
@@ -28,2 +26,2 @@
-# Source this file from an interactive shell after bash-completion is loaded:
-#   source /path/to/jcmd-completion.bash
+# Source this file from an interactive shell:
+#   source /path/to/bash-completion/jcmd
@@ -32,1 +30,2 @@
-if ! type complete >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+# 'complete' is a Bash builtin from Programmable Completion framework
+if ! builtin complete &>/dev/null; then
@@ -138,1 +137,1 @@
-  # Second argument: diagnostic command.
+  # 2nd argument: diagnostic command.
